mapper.select: SELECT teacher_id, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settled_at <= #{frozenThreshold} THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) as available_usd, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settled_at > #{frozenThreshold} THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) as frozen_t7_usd, COALESCE(SUM(amount_usd), 0) as total_earned_usd FROM teacher_income WHERE deleted = 0 AND teacher_id IN #{id} GROUP BY teacher_id
